entities.name: KABULI CHICKPEA
entities.description: A variety of chickpea (Cicer arietinum L.) studied for breeding progress in Ethiopia

entities.name: GRAIN YIELD
entities.description: The amount of seed produced per unit area, used as a primary measure of breeding progress

entities.name: HUNDRED SEED WEIGHT
entities.description: The weight of 100 seeds, identified as a yield-related character with a dramatic response to breeding

entities.name: REGRESSION ANALYSIS
entities.description: A statistical method used to estimate the average annual rate of increase in grain yield potential

entities.name: RANDOMIZED COMPLETE BLOCK DESIGN
entities.description: The experimental design used to evaluate chickpea varieties at the research farm

entities.name: ETHIOPIA
entities.description: The country where the breeding program and variety evaluations were conducted

entities.name: DEBREZEIT AGRICULTURAL RESEARCH CENTER
entities.description: The specific experimental research farm where the varieties were evaluated

entities.name: GENOTYPIC CHANGE
entities.description: The genetic variation that served as an important source for increased grain yield potential

entities.name: GENETIC PROGRESS
entities.description: The cumulative improvement in seed yield and related characters over a 43-year breeding period

entities.name: YIELD RELATED TRAITS
entities.description: Characters that contribute to the overall grain yield of the crop
